text: Established Unit-I with 10,000 sq.ft shop floor under the leadership of C.S.N. Reddy.
First aerostructure RCS delivered to ISRO. Agni-1 & 2 rocket motor casings delivered to DRDO.
First industry to develop the L40 structure for GSLV — successfully delivered to ISRO.
First private sector company to integrate RCS & VTP and deliver to DRDO.
Became lead vendor for PSLV & GSLV auxiliary separation systems. Sagarika series airframes delivered.
Established Unit-II with 70,000 sq.ft — dedicated to DRDO & ISRO programmes.
First Hyderabad-based industry to produce Maraging Steel M250 rocket motor casings Ø740mm for DRDO. Over 100 casings delivered to date.
Airframes, control surfaces and motor casings for Pralay (DRDO) delivered. First unmanned crew module structure to ISRO. LVM3 Core Base Shroud completed.
First metal canister manufacturing facility for DRDO established. PSOXL motor case successfully tested — 90 casings delivered.
Airframes, motor casings and control surface panels delivered for India's first Hypersonic Glide Vehicle.
Unit-III established — 45,000 sq.ft dedicated to global defence manufacturing requirements.

label: 01 // LVM3 CORE BASE SHROUD
title: LVM3 CORE BASE SHROUD
desc: THIS ASSEMBLY COMBINES ADVANCED SHEET METAL FORMING WITH ISOGRID PANEL MACHINING, STRUCTURAL RIVETING THROUGH FIXTURE AND INTEGRATION, ROLLING OF BRACKETS.

label: 02 // STABILIZER FIN ASSY.
title: STABILIZER FIN ASSEMBLY
desc: CONSTRUCTED FROM 108 COMPONENTS, THE COMPLETE FIN ASSEMBLY SHOWCASES COMPLEX MACHINING AND RIVETING OF SPECIALIZED MATERIALS LIKE TITANIUM GRADE 5, INCONEL, AND 13-8 MO.

label: 03 // NOSE CAP ASSY.
title: NOSE CAP ASSEMBLY
desc: PRECISION-FORMED NOSE CAP MACHINED FROM HIGH-STRENGTH ALUMINIUM ALLOY, FEATURING TIGHT-TOLERANCE OGIVE PROFILE AND INTEGRATED ATTACHMENT FLANGE FOR FLIGHT-CRITICAL AEROSTRUCTURE PROGRAMMES.

label: 04 // METAL CANISTER
title: METAL CANISTER
desc: SPECIALIZED MISSILE LAUNCH CANISTER UTILIZING WELDED SA516 AND 15CDV6 CONSTRUCTION. HYDRAULIC PRESSURE TESTING UP TO 10 BAR AND PNEUMATIC LEAK TESTING UP TO 0.3 BAR.

title: DESIGN REVIEW & DFM ANALYSIS
desc: Engineering review of customer drawings against our manufacturing capabilities.
detail: Tolerance stack analysis, fixturing strategy, material sourcing

title: MATERIAL PROCUREMENT & CERTIFICATION
desc: Certified raw material sourced from approved vendors with full traceability.
detail: Mill certificates, chemical composition, mechanical property verification

title: FIRST ARTICLE INSPECTION PLAN
desc: FAIR developed per AS9102 before any production run begins.
detail: Balloon drawings, measurement plan, acceptance criteria defined

title: CNC PROGRAMMING & SIMULATION
desc: 5-axis tool paths simulated and verified before cutting begins.
detail: Collision detection, cycle time optimisation, G-code validation

title: PRECISION MACHINING
desc: Multi-axis CNC milling and turning to final dimensions.
detail: In-process gauging, tool wear monitoring, coolant management

title: SPECIAL PROCESS — WELDING
desc: Certified TIG / electron beam welding in controlled clean room.
detail: WPS qualified to ISRO & DRDO standards, welder certification current

title: HEAT TREATMENT & SURFACE TREATMENT
desc: Stress relief, ageing and surface coatings applied per specification.
detail: Temperature-logged furnace records, traceability to batch

title: NDT INSPECTION
desc: Ultrasonic, dye penetrant, X-ray and eddy current inspection.
detail: Level-II certified NDT operators, reports issued per EN 4179

title: CMM & DIMENSIONAL VERIFICATION
desc: Full 3D measurement on Zeiss CMM with laser scanning arm.
detail: GD&T verification, deviation reporting, first article sign-off

title: DELIVERY & DOCUMENTATION
desc: Preservation, packaging and full documentation package dispatched.
detail: C of C, material certs, inspection reports, FAIR dossier

heroSubtext: Delivering flight-critical aerostructures, precision components and integrated assemblies for ISRO, DRDO and HAL programmes.
